depositForBurn(uint256,uint32,bytes32,ad.notice: Burn USDC and transfer to destination chain (no hook).         Use for unconditional transfers where no post-mint logic is needed.

depositForBurnWithHook(uint256,uint32,by.notice: Burn USDC with a hook for conditional destination execution.         hookData MUST be non-empty — use depositForBurn for plain transfers.
